name: Claude Code Relay
description: Dispatches agent tasks to a local Claude Code CLI process, relays progress and results back to the originating channel. Enables an 'OpenClaw shell + Claude Code brain' architecture where the main agent acts as a secretary that forwards all requests to Claude Code for execution.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: How the agent uses Claude Code CLI. 'relay': agent forwards ALL requests to CC (secretary pattern). 'hybrid': agent decides when to use CC vs answer directly. 'tool-only': just registers the tool, no prompt modification. Default: hybrid.

claudeBin.label: Claude CLI Path
claudeBin.help: Path to the Claude Code CLI binary. Defaults to 'claude' on PATH.

workdir.label: Working Directory
workdir.help: Working directory for Claude Code sessions. Defaults to the agent workspace.

runAsUser.label: Run As User
runAsUser.help: Optional OS user to run Claude Code as (via runuser). Leave empty to use the current user.

permissionMode.label: Permission Mode
permissionMode.help: Claude Code permission mode for tool execution.

model.label: Model
model.help: Anthropic model to use for Claude Code sessions (e.g. claude-opus-4-6).

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.help: Maximum execution time per task. Default: 7200 (2 hours).

progressIntervalSeconds.label: Progress Interval (seconds)
progressIntervalSeconds.help: How often to send progress updates to the channel. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 60.

maxResultChars.label: Max Result Characters
maxResultChars.help: Maximum characters in the result message sent to the channel. Default: 4000.

maxAttachments.label: Max Attachments
maxAttachments.help: Maximum number of new/modified files to send as attachments. Default: 10.

maxAttachmentBytes.label: Max Attachment Size
maxAttachmentBytes.help: Maximum file size in bytes for attachments. Default: 10MB.
